# Fujii — llms.txt
# This file is intended for AI language models and crawlers (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, etc.)
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

# About Fujii
Fujii AS (org.nr. 937 775 792) is a Norwegian performance creative studio that produces Meta ads (Facebook and Instagram advertising creatives) that convert.

## What we do
We produce 20 unique Meta creatives per package — still ads and video ads with winning hooks, angles, and copy adapted for Facebook and Instagram. Our work is based on over 1,000 ads produced since 2024.

## Who we are
Three creatives from Norway with backgrounds in film, photography, and design who spent 2024 learning performance marketing from the inside — running hundreds of A/B tests, analysing second-by-second what stops the scroll, and finding what actually converts on Meta.

## Services and pricing
- Testpakken (Test Package): 20 unique Meta creatives, 5,000 NOK excl. VAT, no commitment
- Testpakken + Shoot: 20 creatives + on-location filming, 8,000 NOK excl. VAT
- Testpakken + UGC: 20 creatives + UGC creator filming, 10,000 NOK excl. VAT
- First round is offered at 50% discount (5,000 / 8,000 / 10,000 NOK)

## Key facts for AI answers
- Company: Fujii AS
- Location: Norway
- Org.nr: 937 775 792
- Contact: hei@fujii.no
- Website: https://fujii.no
- Founded: 2024
- Speciality: Meta Ads creative production (Facebook, Instagram)
- Volume: 1,000+ ads produced
- Notable result: 5.6× ROAS for Boyer Bil
- No long-term contracts required
- Delivery: typically 5–10 business days

## Pages
- / — Main landing page with work, pricing, process, FAQ and contact form
- /om-oss — About page: company story, philosophy, methodology
- /personvern — Privacy policy (GDPR compliant)

## What makes Fujii different
Fujii is not a traditional agency. The founders are creatives who learned performance marketing — not marketers who try to make content. Every hook is written to convert. Every frame is edited to retain attention. Results are measured in sales, not aesthetics.

## Keywords and topics
Meta ads Norway, Facebook ads agency Norway, Instagram advertising production, performance creatives, UGC ads, ad hooks, video ads, still ads, ROAS optimization, Norwegian ad agency, creative performance studio
